info.name: Identity Lifecycle Management
info.description:
This collection models the end-to-end identity lifecycle for user accounts, using the [Reqres](https://reqres.in) API as a reference backend. It is organized into four sequential stages that mirror how a user moves through a system — from initial provisioning to final removal.

**User Onboarding** — Covers the creation of new user accounts by submitting profile details via a `POST` request to the `/api/users` endpoint.

**Identity Verification** — Handles the lookup and confirmation of existing users by retrieving their profile data via a `GET` request to the `/api/users` endpoint.

**Access Management** — Manages updates to user account details, applying partial modifications to a user's record via a `PATCH` request to `/api/users/{id}`.

**User Offboarding** — Handles the deprovisioning and permanent removal of user accounts via a `DELETE` request to `/api/users/{id}`.

Together, these folders provide a structured workflow for testing the full lifecycle of a user identity — create, read, update, and delete — against a live API environment.

item.name: User Onboarding
item.description: Contains requests for registering and creating new user accounts. This folder handles the initial step of the identity lifecycle — provisioning a new user in the system by submitting their profile details via a POST request to the users endpoint.

item.name: Identity Verification
item.description: Contains requests for verifying and retrieving existing user identities. This folder covers the lookup step of the identity lifecycle — confirming that a user exists in the system by fetching their profile data via a GET request to the users endpoint.

item.name: Access Management
item.description: Contains requests for modifying and updating existing user account details. This folder handles the access and profile management step of the identity lifecycle — applying partial updates to a user's record in the system via a PATCH request to the users endpoint.

item.name: User Offboarding
item.description: Contains requests for deprovisioning and removing user accounts from the system. This folder handles the final step of the identity lifecycle — permanently deleting a user's record via a DELETE request to the users endpoint.
